title: MBBS in Russia for Indian Students | Fees & Eligibility
description: Study MBBS in Russia with Atlas Mentor — top universities, fees, eligibility, and free counselling for Indian students.

MBBS in Russia

Russia

Study MBBS in Russia for Indian Students

Russia is one of the best destinations for Indian students to study MBBS. With world-class medical universities, affordable fees, and globally recognized degrees, Russia offers an excellent opportunity for students who want to become doctors.

Universities In Russia?

High-Quality Education

Russian medical universities provide top-class education with a strong focus on practical training in modern hospitals.

Affordable Fees

MBBS in Russia is budget-friendly, with tuition fees ranging from ₹2.5 lakh to ₹6 lakh per year, much lower than private Indian colleges.

Globally Recognized Degree

Degrees from Russian universities are WHO & NMC-approved, allowing graduates to work in India, Russia, or other countries.

Eligibility

Eligibility for MBBS in Russia for Indian Students

Indian students who wish to study MBBS in Russia must meet the following requirements

NEET Qualification

Students must pass the NEET exam to apply for admission in MBBS course in russia.

Age Requirement

The student must be at least 17 years old by December 31 of the admission year. The maximum age limit is 25 years.

Qualification

Students must have 50% marks in PCB (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) in 12th grade (40% for reserved categories).

Nationality Certificate

Students must provide proof of Indian nationality before applying for the MBBS in russia.

Russia

Is Russia safe for Indian medical students?

Yes, Russia is safe and student-friendly for Indian medical students. With thousands of Indian students already studying there, the country provides a secure and welcoming environment.

  • Secure Hostels & Campuses – Universities offer 24/7 security and CCTV surveillance in hostels and campuses.

  • Student-Friendly Cities – Russian cities are safe, and locals are friendly towards international students.

  • Strong Indian Community – Many Indian students are already studying in Russia, creating a supportive community.

  • Public Transport & Safety Measures – Russia has safe and well-connected public transport systems with security checks.

  • No Racial Discrimination – Russia is a multicultural country, and international students are treated with respect.

By following basic safety precautions and carrying necessary ID documents, students can have a comfortable and secure stay in Russia.

Advantages of Studying MBBS in Russia

Russia is one of the best destinations for Indian students to pursue MBBS due to its affordable fees, high-quality education, and globally recognized degree. With modern facilities, practical training, and a safe environment, Russia provides an excellent opportunity for students to fulfill their dream of becoming a doctor.

1. Affordable Education

Tuition fees are much lower than private medical colleges in India.

2. High-Quality Education

Universities offer modern facilities, advanced medical technology, and practical training.

3. No Donation or Entrance Exam

Admission is based on NEET qualification, with no extra charges.

4. English Medium Courses

Many universities teach in English, making it easier for Indian students.

5. Globally Recognized Degree

MBBS degrees are approved by WHO, NMC, ECFMG, and other medical bodies.

6. Part-Time Work Opportunities

Students can work while studying to gain experience.

7. Indian Food Availability

Many universities have Indian mess facilities for students.

8. Safe and Friendly Environment

Russia is a secure country with a welcoming atmosphere for Indian students.

9. International Career Opportunities

Graduates can work in India, Russia, or other countries after clearing required exams.

10. NMC Screening Test Training

Indian students get coaching for FMGE/NExT while studying in Russia.

LOAN

Education Loan for Indian Students to Study MBBS in Russia

Indian students can apply for education loans to cover their tuition fees, hostel charges, and living expenses while studying MBBS in Russia. Many banks and financial institutions offer loans to help students fulfill their dream of becoming a doctor.

  • Loan Coverage – Covers tuition fees, hostel fees, travel, and other expenses related to studying abroad.

  • Required Documents – NEET scorecard, university admission letter, fee structure, parent's income proof, and property/assets details.

  • Loan Amount – Varies based on the university and student's financial background. Can go up to ₹20-30 lakhs.

  • Repayment Period – Usually 5-10 years, with repayment starting after course completion.

  • Government & Private Banks – SBI, PNB, HDFC, Axis Bank, and other financial institutions offer education loans.

  • Subsidy & Interest Rates – Some banks offer low-interest rates and subsidies for eligible students.

F. A. Q

Frequently Asked Questions on MBBS in Russia

Planning to study MBBS in Russia? Here are some of the most common questions Indian students ask before applying, covering eligibility, fees, duration, and career opportunities.

What is the duration of MBBS in Russia?

MBBS in Russia is 6 years long, including 5 years of academics and 1 year of internship.

Is NEET required for MBBS in Russia?

Yes, Indian students must qualify NEET to be eligible for admission to Russian medical universities.

What is the cost of studying MBBS in Russia?

Tuition fees range from ₹2.0 lakh to ₹6.0 lakh per year, depending on the university. Living expenses are also affordable.

Is the MBBS degree from Russia valid in India?

Yes, degrees from NMC-approved universities are valid in India. Graduates must pass FMGE (NEXT) to practice in India.

Can students work part-time while studying MBBS in Russia?

Yes, students can work part-time while studying, but their main focus should be on their medical education.
